title: Media presentation and asset systems
summary: Presentation rules and interface surfaces for music, imagery and digital assets across the House experience.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Media production and distribution responsibility: Presentation rules and interface surfaces for music, imagery and digital assets across the House experience.
